code:
import io
import string

let maybe = io.read_line()
mut s = ""
match maybe
when Some(line)
  s = line
when None
  s = ""
end

let n = string.len(s)
mut i = 0
mut sum = 0
mut done = false

while i < n and not done
  mut ws = true
  while ws and i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        i = i + 1
      else
        ws = false
      end
    when None
      ws = false
    end
  end

  if i >= n
    done = true
  else
    mut sign = 1
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end

    mut value = 0
    mut has_digit = false
    mut parsing = true
    while parsing and i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
          has_digit = true
          i = i + 1
        else
          parsing = false
        end
      when None
        parsing = false
      end
    end

    if has_digit
      let signed = sign * value
      if signed < 0
        done = true
      else
        sum = sum + signed
      end
    else
      done = true
    end
  end
end

print("partial=#{sum}")
